zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Rookwood Esquire於1480年之前出生在英國素福爾可艾尤斯頓時，他的父親Roger Rookwood30歲，母親Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood22歲。他於大約1501年與Mrs. Edmund Rookwood在英國英格蘭素福爾可艾尤斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1523年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Rookwood Esquire于1480年之前出生在英国素福爾可艾尤斯頓时，他的父亲Roger Rookwood30岁，母亲Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood22岁。他于大约1501年与Mrs. Edmund Rookwood在英国英格兰素福爾可艾尤斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1523年。

nameMeanings.name: Rookwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places in Essex and Sussex named in Middle English with rok(e) ‘rook’ + wod(e) ‘wood’ (Old English hrōc, wudu).

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Rookwood Esquire was born before 1480, in Euston, Suffolk, England, his father, Roger Rookwood, was 30 and his mother, Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood, was 22. He married Mrs. Edmund Rookwood about 1501, in Euston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1523.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Rookwood Esquire est né avant 1480, à Euston, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Roger Rookwood, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Edmund Rookwood environ 1501, à Euston, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1523.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Rookwood Esquire vor 1480 in Euston, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Rookwood 30 und seine Mutter Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood 22. Er hat um 1501 in Euston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Edmund Rookwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1523.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Rookwood Esquire è nato il prima del 1480 nel Euston, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Roger Rookwood, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Edmund Rookwood circa 1501, nel Euston, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1523.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Rookwood Esquireが1480年以前にイギリススフォルクエウストンで生まれた時，父Roger Rookwoodは30歳，母Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwoodは22歳であった。約1501年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエウストンでMrs. Edmund Rookwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1523年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Rookwood Esquire(이)가 1480년 이전 영국 수폴크 우스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Rookwood(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 우스턴에서 Mrs. Edmund Rookwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1523년 사망했다.

mn.Euston, Suffolk, England: Euston, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Rookwood Esquire nasceu antes 1480, em Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Rookwood, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Edmund Rookwood aproximadamente 1501, em Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1523.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Rookwood Esquire родился перед 1480 г. в местности эустон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Rookwood было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Edmund Rookwood около 1501 г. в местности эустон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1523 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Rookwood Esquire nació antes de 1480, en Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Rookwood, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mrs. Edmund Rookwood aproximadamente 1501, en Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1523.
